## Description

Brief description of the changes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New widget
- [ ] Refactor / code quality
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `dart analyze --fatal-infos .` passes with zero issues
- [ ] `dart format --set-exit-if-changed .` reports no changes
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`flutter test`)
- [ ] New widgets have ≥ 6 `testWidgets` in their test file
- [ ] New public APIs have `///` doc comments
- [ ] Uses `HookWidget` (not `StatefulWidget` / `StatelessWidget`)
- [ ] Border colors read from `WiredTheme.of(context)`, not hardcoded

Closes #
